parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title $update-core

actor "Integrating application user" as User
participant "Integrating application" as App #6495ED
participant "<FHIR API> HPI" as HPI #6495ED
participant "HPI MDM" as MDM #6495ED

User -> App : Provide core details to be\nupdated
activate App

App -> HPI : POST<Endpoint>/Practitioner/$update-core
activate HPI

HPI -> HPI : Validate[]

HPI -> MDM : Request
activate MDM
MDM --> HPI
deactivate MDM

HPI --> App : Return updated Practitioner\nrecord
deactivate HPI

App -> User : Display updated Provider\ndetails to user
deactivate App

@enduml
```
